description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, elegant design with a gently curved front and a natural wood top that contrasts with the dark, painted body. The front face displays three spacious drawers, each adorned with two round, black knob handles and a central keyhole, suggesting the possibility of locking mechanisms. The sides and back are flat and unadorned, with subtle panel detailing on the sides and a smooth, continuous surface on the back. The top surface is broad, flat, and slightly scalloped along the front edge, providing ample space for placing decorative or functional items. The chest stands on four short, turned legs, adding a touch of traditional craftsmanship. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for both residential and urban indoor environments such as lobbies, hallways, or converted garage spaces.
description: A classic chest of drawers with a natural wood top, dark painted body, curved front, and round black knob handles. It features three drawers, subtle paneling, and short turned legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with round black knobs, central keyholes, and a gently curved front.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, paneled side and the scalloped edge of the wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a smooth, unadorned back with two vertical panels and the overhanging wood top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the flat panel and scalloped wood top edge.
